---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Hive
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
<!-- A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve -->
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

## Proposed Solution
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->
**Describe the solution you'd like**

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->
**Describe alternatives you've considered**

## Use Case
<!-- Help us understand your workflow -->
**How would you use this feature?**

## Benefits
<!-- Who else might benefit from this feature? -->
**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Individual developers
- [ ] Teams
- [ ] Open source maintainers
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Other: <!-- Please specify -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Critical - Blocking my workflow
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Future consideration

## Implementation Ideas
<!-- If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented -->
**Do you have any implementation suggestions?**

## Mockups/Examples
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or examples -->
**Visual examples or mockups**

## Related Features
<!-- Are there existing features this relates to or would enhance? -->
**Related to existing features**

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here -->

---
<!-- Thank you for suggesting this feature! We love hearing ideas from the community. -->
